name: komodor
description: A Pulumi package for creating and managing Komodor resources.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`komodor` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/komodorio/terraform-provider-komodor).

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi package for creating and managing Komodor resources.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/komodorio/terraform-provider-komodor)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-komodor` repo](https://github.com/phillipedwards/pulumi-komodor/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-komodor` repo](https://github.com/komodorio/terraform-provider-komodor/issues).

apiKey.description: The API key for operations. Alternatively, can be configured using the `KOMODOR_API_KEY` or `KOMODOR_TOKEN` environment variables.

provider.description:
The provider type for the komodor package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

apiKey.description: The API key for operations. Alternatively, can be configured using the `KOMODOR_API_KEY` or `KOMODOR_TOKEN` environment variables.
The API key for operations. Alternatively, can be configured using the `KOMODOR_API_KEY` or `KOMODOR_TOKEN` environment variables.

stateInputs.description: Input properties used for looking up and filtering Action resources.

clusterName.description: The name of the Kubernetes cluster
The name of the Kubernetes cluster

stateInputs.description: Input properties used for looking up and filtering Kubernetes resources.

clusterName.description: The name of the Kubernetes cluster

active.description: : Indicates whether the monitor is enabled.

isDeleted.description: : Default is `false`. Indicates whether the monitor has been marked for deletion.

name.description: : The name of the monitor. Defaults to an empty string if not provided.

sensors.description: : Defines the scope of monitoring (e.g., cluster, namespaces, services, etc.).

sinks.description: : Defines notification channels for the monitor, such as Slack, Teams, PagerDuty, Opsgenie, or Webhook.

sinksOptions.description: : Specifies additional notification settings like notifyOn. Valid values depend on the monitor type.

type.description: : The monitor type. Must be one of: `availability`, `node`, `PVC`, `job`, `cronJob`, `deploy`, or `workflow`.

variables.description: : Additional settings required for specific monitor types.

pulumi:providers:komodor/terraformConfig.description: This function returns a Terraform config object with terraform-namecased keys,to be used with the Terraform Module Provider.
